message:
fix(lab): deterministic violation selection in actor/mailbox oracles

ActorLeakOracle::check() iterated region_closes (HashMap) and
actors_by_region (HashMap<_, HashSet>) in non-deterministic order.
When multiple regions had leaked actors, which violation was reported
first depended on HashMap iteration order.

MailboxOracle::check() iterated mailboxes (HashMap) in non-deterministic
order for message accounting violations.

Both could cause flaky oracle verdicts and mutation test attribution
across runs with identical seeds.

Fix: sort region keys and actor IDs before iterating in
ActorLeakOracle::check(), and sort actor keys before iterating in
MailboxOracle::check(). Matches the pattern used by TaskLeakOracle
and other deterministic oracles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
